title: __PROJECT_NAME__ development charter
proposition: Develop a six-legged robot that establishes stable commanded locomotion in MuJoCo before robustness, learning, or hardware transfer claims are introduced.

morphology.notes: Free-base hexapod with two actuated sagittal joints and one contact sensor per leg.

capabilityStages.name: Nominal gait foundation
capabilityStages.question: Can the initial morphology survive and produce measurable commanded forward motion on a level floor?
exitCriteria: The locked nominal Benchmark completes without a survival gate violation.
The authoritative Studio replay and metrics agree on the observed motion.
Any next robustness or ML stage is added to this Charter with explicit scenarios first.

nonGoals: Claiming robust hexapod locomotion from the starter gait
Reusing a quadruped Controller or Policy without a compatible six-leg contract
Treating simulation evidence as hardware qualification
